security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; frame-src http://*.localhost:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420; img-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 data: blob:; style-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 'unsafe-eval'; frame-src http://*.localhost:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: 百积木本地连接客户端
bundle.longDescription: 百积木本地连接客户端，用于配置本机能力并安全连接到百积木平台。
